Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets summarize the steps in order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The patient begins with Arrival A then Registration RG then Intake Assessment IA So these three are in sequence A to RG to IA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After IA the patient undergoes Triage Interview TI and then Triage Classification TC in sequence TI to TC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Based on triage classification there is an exclusive choice between two diagnostic tests Comprehensive ECG CE or Full Blood Panel FBP So we have an XOR between CE and FBP

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the initial diagnostic test there is a loop that starts if results are abnormal

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop body should include SC then an XOR between TM and SPT then an XOR between FCE and FBA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets read the description of the loop operator the process tree A is executed then either you exit the loop or you execute B and then A again

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We could set B tau a silent step that does nothing but allows the loop to continue

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So well use star of LoopBody and tau where A is the sequence SC then choice TM or SPT then choice FCE or FBA

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If results are normal we do not enter the loop So after the test we either do the loop if abnormal or skip it if normal

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can represent this as after the test we have an XOR between the loop and tau

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the loop or skip we have two activities in true concurrency Advanced Imaging AI and Nutritional Counseling NC So we have plus of AI and NC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then a sequence Follow up Appointment Scheduling FAS and then Detailed Discharge Instructions DDI

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Finally a concurrency block with three activities in parallel Billing BL Insurance Claims Processing ICP and Medical Records Finalization MRF So we nest the parallel operator

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The overall process is a sequence of blocks

Name: Validation - PE
Text: According to the description yes because each step follows the previous one in order except for the parallel blocks inside

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the root is the final sequence combining start sequence initial test optional loop advanced diagnostics final admin sequence and final concurrency block

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus the final process tree expression is as above
